Uses of Class
com.irurueta.ar.calibration.CalibrationException

  • Packages that use CalibrationException 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.ar.calibration
    This package contains classes used for camera calibration on 3D reconstruction
    com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators
    This package contains classes needed to estimate structures needed for camera calibration

    • Uses of CalibrationException in com.irurueta.ar.calibration

      Subclasses of CalibrationException in com.irurueta.ar.calibration 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  InvalidPlaneAtInfinityException
      Exception produced when plane at infinity cannot be determined.
      Methods in com.irurueta.ar.calibration that throw CalibrationException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void AlternatingCameraCalibrator.calibrate()
      Starts the calibration process.
      abstract void CameraCalibrator.calibrate()
      Starts the calibration process.
      void ErrorOptimizationCameraCalibrator.calibrate()
      Starts the calibration process.
      protected void CameraCalibratorSample.computeCameraPose​(com.irurueta.geometry.PinholeCameraIntrinsicParameters intrinsic)
      Computes camera pose using estimated homography and provided intrinsic pinhole camera parameters that have been estimated so far.
      protected void CameraCalibrator.estimateIntrinsicParameters​(List<com.irurueta.geometry.Point2D> idealFallbackPatternMarkers)
      Estimates pinhole camera intrinsic parameters without accounting for lens radial distortion.
      protected double AlternatingCameraCalibrator.estimateRadialDistortion​(List<com.irurueta.geometry.Point2D> idealFallbackPatternMarkers)
      Estimates radial distortion using estimated intrinsic parameters among all samples to estimate their camera poses to find non distorted points and compare them with the sampled ones.
      protected double ErrorOptimizationCameraCalibrator.estimateRadialDistortion​(List<com.irurueta.geometry.Point2D> idealFallbackPatternMarkers)
      Estimates radial distortion by minimizing the reprojection error by adjusting the camera pose and radial distortion parameters using an optimization algorithm.

    • Uses of CalibrationException in com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators

      Subclasses of CalibrationException in com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  CalibrationEstimatorException
      Base class for calibration estimators.
      class  DualAbsoluteQuadricEstimatorException
      Thrown when DAQ estimation fails.
      class  ImageOfAbsoluteConicEstimatorException
      Thrown when IAC estimation fails.
      class  KruppaDualImageOfAbsoluteConicEstimatorException
      Thrown when DIAC estimation fails.
      class  RadialDistortionEstimatorException
      Thrown when radial distortion estimation fails.
      class  SingleHomographyPinholeCameraEstimatorException
      Thrown when camera estimation fails.
